calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Layla Mann.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) N.A., and against defendant Layla Mann as follows:

Principal - $2,751.90.
Interest - $1,254.01.
Costs - $580.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,025.00.
Costs - $304.50.
Total - $6,335.41.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Set For Trial On Jul-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Continued To Apr-09-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Continued To Feb-26-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
